    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    G

    gameLoop - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Frame loop that drives gameplay simulation and HUD refresh.
    gameOver - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    True when match has ended and input/update should stop.
    getAmmoText() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Returns the ammo text node used by ammo-based characters.
    getAtk() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns attack value.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns attack hitbox data for melee-like attacks.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
    Returns hybrid attack data.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
    Returns melee hitbox data.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Returns Vampire melee hitbox data.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Hammer
    Returns Hammer melee hitbox size.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Katana
    Returns Katana melee hitbox size.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Pyro
    Returns Pyro melee hitbox size.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Archer uses projectile spawning, not melee hitbox data.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Bubble uses projectile attack so hitbox attack data is unused.
    getAttackData() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Mage uses projectile attack model, so melee attack data is unused.
    getAttackHitbox() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Returns the active attack hitbox node for rendering/debugging.
    getAttackInterval() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Computes minimum nanosecond interval between attacks from character attack speed.
    getAttackRange() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns attack range.
    getAttackSpeed() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns attack speed.
    getAttackState() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns attack state.
    getBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns skill buff amount.
    getBuffText() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Returns the buff message text node for scene attachment.
    getCharacter() - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Returns represented character model.
    getCharacter() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Returns character model.
    getCurrentAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Returns current ammo.
    getCurrentAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Returns current ammo.
    getCurrentAmmo() - Method in interface logic.interfaces.UsesAmmo
    Returns current ammo count.
    getDamage() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Returns raw projectile damage.
    getDef() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns defense value.
    getDirectionX() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Returns X direction component.
    getDirectionY() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Returns Y direction component.
    getFrameIndex() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns current animation frame index.
    getHeight() - Method in class logic.entity.AttackData
    Returns hitbox height.
    getHitbox() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Returns collision hitbox rectangle.
    getHp() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns current HP.
    getInstance() - Static method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Returns the currently active Scene2 instance.
    getLifeStealMultiplier() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Returns life-steal multiplier.
    getMaxAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Returns maximum ammo.
    getMaxAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Returns max ammo capacity.
    getMaxAmmo() - Method in interface logic.interfaces.UsesAmmo
    Returns maximum ammo capacity.
    getMaxHp() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns maximum HP.
    getMaxHp() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Returns cached max HP.
    getName() - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Returns represented character name.
    getName() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns character name.
    getOrigin() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns original stat snapshot used by buff reset.
    getOriginAttackRange() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Returns original attack range.
    getOriginLifeStealMultiplier() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Returns baseline life-steal multiplier used for reset.
    getOwner() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Returns projectile owner.
    getPlayer_1_Character() - Static method in class logic.gameLogic.Selection
    Returns player 1 selected character.
    getPlayer_2_Character() - Static method in class logic.gameLogic.Selection
    Returns player 2 selected character.
    getPlayerRoot() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Returns root group containing player visuals.
    getScene() - Static method in class application.SceneHandler
    Returns the shared scene instance.
    getSkillCooldownProgress() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Returns normalized cooldown progress for skill bar rendering.
    getSkillState() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns skill state.
    getSprite() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Returns sprite node used for rendering and collision.
    getSprite() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Returns body sprite.
    getState() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Returns current player state.
    getTotalFrames() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns total configured animation frames.
    getWeaponSprite() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Returns weapon sprite node.
    getWeaponSprite() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Returns weapon sprite node.
    getWidth() - Method in class logic.entity.AttackData
    Returns hitbox width.
    GRAVITY - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Gravity acceleration per frame.
